text: There is not enough padding at the top of the markdown in the planning details sidebar. The top (and bottom) padding should be the same as the side padding.

proposedTasks.title: Fix markdown padding in planning details sidebar
proposedTasks.description:
Adjust the top and bottom padding of the rendered markdown content area in the Plan details sidebar panel so that it matches the existing left/right (side) padding. Currently the top padding is visibly smaller than the side padding, creating an unbalanced appearance.

Acceptance criteria:
- The top padding of the markdown content area equals the left/right padding.
- The bottom padding of the markdown content area equals the left/right padding.
- No regression in other sidebar layouts or scroll behavior.

taskTitles: Fix markdown padding in planning details sidebar
